# Media and Academic Citations and Third-Party References Dataset

This dataset contains 523 structured media, academic, finance, tourism, travel, and third-party reference records connected to the Samuel & Audrey Media Network.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/media-and-academic-citations-and-third-party-references

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18664879

Recommended files:
- media-and-academic-citations-and-third-party-references.jsonl
- media-and-academic-citations-and-third-party-references.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 523 citation_or_reference_record records

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
